scripts.report:backup-history: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "if (Test-Path allure-report\history) { Copy-Item -Path allure-report\history -Destination allure-results\history -Recurse -Force }"
scripts.report:backup-history-bash: mkdir -p allure-results/history && [ -d allure-report/history ] && cp -r allure-report/history/* allure-results/history/ || true
scripts.fluxo-completo: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "npm run cy:run; npm run report:backup-history; npm run report:gen; npm run report:open"
